headline: It starts all over again!
summary: The first Calvin and Hobbes strip.

headline: tiger trap
summary: Calvin rigs a tuna-fish tiger trap and argues with Dad.

headline: bedtime noise
summary: Dad tells Calvin to stop the noise and go to sleep.

headline: show and tell
summary: Calvin must put Hobbes in his locker or under his chair.

headline: monsters
summary: Calvin asks Dad to check for monsters under the bed and dresser.
